original_image_tags: US Army "SAVE" Conservation Program stamp located top left.
Small circular hole punch marks in top center.
Large black redaction/mark on top left near "SAVE" stamp.

elements.description: A circular logo at the top left with text 'SAVE CONSERVATION PAPER' around a central 'SAVE' with smaller text inside. A rectangular 'DECLASSIFIED' label at the top right with 'Authority: NND 90986' below.

A typed memorandum on Air Materiel Command letterhead, dated 9 September 1948, addressed to the FBI Laboratory regarding a soil sample from a 'flying saucer' depression for Project 'SIGN'. Includes various handwritten annotations, file numbers, and a 'COPIES DESTROYED' stamp at the bottom.

judge.reason: Description B describes a detailed memorandum with typed text and stamps as visual content, while Description A only mentions a stamp, hole punch marks, and a black mark, indicating completely different visual content.
